query: need a YTD sales measure on my Sales fact table that resets each fiscal year, our year starts July 1
why: Year-to-date running total with fiscal-year start is core time-intelligence DAX.

query: how do i compare this month's revenue to the same month last year in a card visual
why: Same-period-last-year comparison is a flagship time-intelligence pattern.

query: I want a column that shows the % change in Orders vs the prior quarter for my exec dashboard
why: Period-over-period (vs prior quarter) growth calc is time intelligence.

query: build a trailing 3-month rolling average of Net Revenue so the trend line is less spiky
why: Moving/rolling average over a date window is explicitly in scope.

query: my inventory fact is semi-additive — how do I get the month-end on-hand quantity instead of summing across days?
why: Semi-additive period-end balance (CLOSINGBALANCE family) is a target recipe.

query: QTD vs prior QTD for our finance scorecard, measures keep returning the full-year total instead of resetting
why: QTD running total plus prior-period comparison is core time intelligence.

query: should I turn off Auto date/time and mark my Calendar table as a date table before writing running totals?
why: Choosing Auto date/time vs marked date table for time intelligence is in the When-to-Use list.

query: year-end headcount measure that takes the last value in December and ignores the other months when I roll up to year
why: Year-end semi-additive balance using last-date-in-period logic is in scope.

query: i need cash balance as of quarter end, summing the daily balances is giving me garbage numbers
why: Quarter-end period-end balance is the semi-additive recipe even though user doesn't name DAX.

query: trailing twelve months revenue measure for the SaaS MRR report, rolling not calendar-year
why: Trailing/rolling window (TTM) is a moving-window time-intelligence pattern.

query: write a DAX measure for gross margin % = (Sales - COGS) / Sales using DIVIDE
why: Plain ratio measure with no time component — needs authoring-dax-measures.

query: how do I decide whether to show monthly revenue as a line chart or a clustered column chart over time
why: Visual selection for a time series, not the DAX calc — needs mapping-questions-to-charts.

query: my inventory on-hand is semi-additive so what visual should I avoid — does a stacked bar misrepresent it?
why: About which visual fits a semi-additive fact, not writing the balance DAX — needs understanding-fact-additivity.

query: I need to create a proper Date table with a contiguous calendar and mark it, plus relationships to my fact tables
why: Building/marking the date table and relationships is modeling, not the time calcs — needs modeling-semantic-data.

query: users want to drill from the yearly revenue column down to quarter then month then day in one visual
why: Date hierarchy drill-down interaction, not time-intelligence DAX — needs drill-pattern-design.

query: add a slicer so people can pick a date range and a relative-date filter for last 30 days on the report
why: Relative-date slicer/filter UI, not a measure — needs building-interactive-reports.

query: my year-over-year report is super slow on a 400M-row fact, how do I speed up the refresh and visuals
why: Performance tuning of a large model/report — needs optimizing-model-performance.

query: create a date dimension in Power Query with M, adding year, quarter, month, fiscal period columns
why: Generating the calendar table columns in Power Query/M — needs transforming-data-power-query.

query: lay out a monthly trend dashboard for retail merchandisers showing sales, traffic, and conversion over time
why: Multi-visual dashboard layout/composition, not the time DAX itself — needs dashboard-composition.

query: for our quarterly board deck I need a pixel-perfect printable P&L with running fiscal-year columns in Report Builder
why: Paginated RDL report authoring, not the DAX pattern — needs building-paginated-reports.
